name: District of Columbia Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to District of Columbia - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description: 899 North Capitol Street, NE, 1st Floor, Washington, DC 20002

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: How much does District of Columbia CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The endorsement application fee is $15. Additional costs may include background check fees.
Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in District of Columbia.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to District of Columbia?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 6 to 8 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in District of Columbia while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
